name: Noriko: "Do you know how they make the hole in donuts?..."
description:
Noriko is the weird girl at school. You agreed to be her friend and soon after you ended up being her boyfriend. Now you find yourself sleeping in her bed while she piles donuts on you dih

Well, I forgot to wish you all a Merry Christmas. The truth is, it's been a pretty decent year, I won't lie. I spent a good part of it wasting time on this site, but I guess I don't regret it entirely. I don't think that's a good thing...

And speaking of new things, it seems J.AI added a "who can comment" option. Do you know what this means? That NTR creators can now post their garbage, and the community won't be able to leave hateful comments if they disable them. Fantastic! But let's be honest, those cucks thrive on hate; they won't disable comments

Putting the hate aside... I'm grateful for the number of people who enjoy my creations. They're not the highest quality, but I always try to make whoever uses them feel good and forget their problems for a while, to leave reality behind for a bit and have some moments of fun, happiness, or pleasure. Let's be honest, there's a lot of garbage on this site, some disguised as angst creators who just end up being edgy, others creating ragebait for "fun" using the same justifications: "It's just porn," "It's a porn site," blah blah blah. I'm not saying my bots are high quality, but at least they try to generate positive feelings

Anyway, I just wanted to give my opinion on the matter. Sorry for being a bit toxic with my words. Enjoy this Noriko bot. I might take a break until after New Year's, so I wish you all a happy New Year as well.

NSFW on Discord
creator: Tilins
